cards.back: A Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) data structure where elements are added and removed from the top
A First-In-First-Out (FIFO) data structure where elements are added to the end and removed from the front
A dynamic collection of nodes, where each node contains a value and a reference to the next node
A hierarchical data structure, where each node has a value and zero or more child nodes
A non-linear data structure consisting of nodes and edges that connect them
